scenarios.title: PC Offline: Port Is Down
scenarios.description: A desk PC is offline. Check the simulated port, interpret the evidence, choose a safe next step, and explain the ticket.
scenarios.interpretation: The port is not detecting a connected endpoint.
scenarios.safety: Do not change the VLAN or shut/no-shut the port until the physical connection and approval are confirmed.
scenarios.ticket_summary: Finance-PC port Gi1/0/24 is not detecting a link. Further physical and interface checks are required.

scenarios.title: Windows Device Has APIPA
scenarios.description: A Windows workstation cannot reach its gateway. Read the simulated address and choose the next safe test.
scenarios.interpretation: The workstation has an APIPA address and no default gateway.
scenarios.safety: Do not change static addressing until the intended DHCP scope and local adapter are confirmed.
scenarios.ticket_summary: The workstation did not receive a usable DHCP address or gateway. Check the adapter, DHCP path, and intended network.
